sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 97:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 97:1
items.html: Because at the moment of expansion to Malchut and the light departs completely from the Partzuf, it immediately returned to expand in Keter, until the disappearance of the light was like a flame that sways here and there. (Inner Light, Item‎ 49)
